name: Moroccan Carrot Salad- Chizu Salada
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon ground hot red chili flakes (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut carrots into 1/4 inch slices.
2. Bring water to boil in a large pot. Add salt and carrots.
3. Cook carrots until tender but with some firmness, then drain and cool.
4. Mix remaining ingredients with carrots. Toss well.
5. Refrigerate salad. Serve cool or at room temperature.
